name: applymate-api-server
description: ExpressJS API gateway for ApplyMate AI. Receives CV/JD uploads, forwards document parsing to the AI-server, validates approval, and sends real application emails through Nodemailer.

scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/app.js && node --check src/controllers/applications.controller.js && node --check src/services/aiClient.js && node --check src/services/emailService.js && node --check src/services/documentService.js && node --check src/services/pdfService.js

author: ApplyMate AI
